jobs.title: Hay Quality Analytics Engineer
jobs.description: HayStack Corporation is hiring a Hay Quality Analytics Engineer to develop real-time scoring models over our 200-million-reading-per-day sensor telemetry platform. You will write range index–backed queries in MarkLogic to detect moisture anomalies, nutrient deficiencies, and pest indicators in real time. You will also design element range indexes for new sensor data types being rolled out in Q3.
requirements: Ability to design element range index configurations
Agricultural science background preferred but not required
